name: Robin Kelly
bio: Robin Kelly is a U.S. Representative from Illinois and entered the 2026 Democratic primary for U.S. Senate. She has served in Congress since 2013 and previously served in the Illinois House. (Source: Shaw Local primary ballot guide, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)

jacket.note: FEC totals pending direct ETL import.

endorsements.significance: Coalition support reported during statewide launch.
